manifest.name: SmartPick

name: SmartPick

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BCS1037/SmartPick/compare/0.7.4...0.7.5

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
### Added

- **Inline AI commands**: AI prompts are now stored directly on toolbar commands. AI commands can be edited in place, including name, prompt, icon, and output behavior.
- **Unified command creation**: The Add command flow now opens a command-type picker for Obsidian commands, AI commands, web links, and keyboard shortcuts.
- **More menu**: The selection toolbar shows the first 8 enabled commands and moves the rest into a More menu, with a direct SmartPick settings shortcut at the bottom.

### Changed

- **Prompt architecture migration**: Removed the standalone prompt templates tab. Existing custom prompt templates are migrated into custom AI commands, and legacy AI commands are backfilled with inline prompts.
- **Toolbar command management**: Settings now separate custom commands and built-in commands into compact icon grids with enable/disable controls and drag sorting.
- **Default command set**: Reduced the default enabled toolbar commands to keep the toolbar shorter and move less common actions behind user opt-in.

### Fixed

- **Settings alignment**: Fixed SmartPick settings alignment in Obsidian's settings modal, including host content padding, declarative setting-row padding, and inherited `h3` title padding inside command cards.
- **Settings tab refresh**: Fixed unstable settings tab refresh behavior under Obsidian 1.13+ declarative settings.



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BCS1037/SmartPick/compare/0.7.3...0.7.4

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
### Changed 🎨
- **[选项设置页排版美化]** 重构了设置面板中的五个交互操作按钮（添加命令、添加 AI 命令、添加链接/快捷指令、添加键盘快捷键、新建分组）。
- **[移除冗余嵌套]** 移除了包装在每个按钮外部的冗余 Setting (即 setting-item) 包装，直接实例化 new ButtonComponent(buttonsContainer)。彻底消除了因 Obsidian 默认样式泄露造成的 .setting-item 上边框分割线、不规则内边距以及按钮不对齐、错位换行的排版顽疾。
- **[高颜值微动效微交互]** 
  - 按钮容器采用 flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px 自适应弹性流布局，在任何窗口宽度下都完美对齐。
  - 所有按钮均拥有统一规范 of 32px 高度与 6px 圆角，配合平滑缓动动画。
  - 为所有按钮注入了精致微动效（Micro-interactions）：悬停时轻微上浮 (translateY(-1px)) 并透出优雅的扩散阴影，点击时自然下压回弹。
  - 建立了清晰的主次视觉分层：将“添加命令”按钮设计为高亮 CTA 风格，其余辅助按钮调和为极其精致低调的半透明沉浸灰。

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BCS1037/SmartPick/compare/0.7.2...0.7.3

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## SmartPick v0.7.2 安全更新 🚀

本版本是一个紧急安全加固版本，专门解决 Obsidian 官方插件商店审查中指出的 `child_process.exec` 安全风险警告。

### Security 🛡️
- **[重要安全升级]** 将自定义快捷键触发机制由底层的 `child_process.exec` (易受 Shell 命令注入漏洞影响) 升级为完全安全的 `child_process.execFile`。移除了 Shell 解释器的介入，100% 杜绝了恶意输入导致的命令注入风险，满足 Obsidian 官方插件商店的安全审查高标准。
- **[通过审查]** 系统剪贴板的读写访问以及 Vault 读取权限均符合 Obsidian 核心安全审查指南并顺利通过审核。


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BCS1037/SmartPick/compare/0.7.1...0.7.2
releases.name: v0.7.2

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## SmartPick v0.7.1 发布 🚀

本版本主要解决了在 Obsidian v1.13.0+（全新声明式设置 API 升级）下，插件设置页面显示为空白/白屏的重大兼容性故障，并实现了完美的新老版本自适应向下兼容。

### Added 🆕
- 引入了对 Obsidian v1.13.0+ 全新声明式设置 API (`getSettingDefinitions()`) 的完美兼容路由支持。
- 新增环境自适应刷新机制 `refresh()`，针对新版（使用 `update()`）和旧版（使用 `display()`）自动计算并运行最佳刷新逻辑，确保 Tab 切换及动态交互零失效。
- 新增 `renderFullSettings(containerEl)` 统一渲染内核，实现 100% 交互与布局逻辑的同质化复用。

### Fixed 🐛
- 彻底修复并解决了插件在最新内测版 Obsidian 1.13.0+ 下设置页面完全白屏/空白的故障。
- **[重要修复]** 解决了因 Obsidian 新版 `SettingTab` 基类引入同名 `renderTab()` 方法，导致插件同名私有渲染函数与之发生命名冲突（Method Shadowing）并抛出致命运行时 `createDiv` 空指针异常的死锁问题（已通过将私有方法更名为 `renderCustomTab` 完美解决）。
- 完美修复了在构建和测试新特性过程中由于 ESLint 限制导致的 TypeScript `any` 类型显式隐患与 `no-unused-vars` 语法警告，目前源码库 100% 通过 lint 检测。

### Security 🛡️
- 在完美兼容高版本 API 检索体系的同时，保持对低版本主程序的完美隔离，杜绝因支持新内测特性而导致老客户端使用产生 Bug 的回归风险。


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BCS1037/SmartPick/compare/0.7.0...0.7.1
releases.name: v0.7.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# SmartPick v0.7.0

We are excited to release **SmartPick v0.7.0**, introducing the highly requested **Quiet Mode (Hold Modifier Key to Trigger)** to provide a distraction-free writing environment.

### 🚀 What's New
* **Quiet Mode**: The toolbar remains hidden unless you hold a configured modifier key (`Shift`, `Alt/Option`, `Cmd/Ctrl`) while selecting text.
* **Smart UI Rendering**: The modifier key dropdown is conditionally rendered and updates dynamically when toggling Quiet Mode in settings.
* **Zero-Conflict Interception**: Synchronously queries native event flags (`e.ctrlKey`, `e.metaKey`, `e.altKey`, `e.shiftKey`) at selection time, ensuring 100% safety from standard shortcuts (like `Cmd+C`).

### 🎨 Modifier Keys Design Logic
Our custom modifier mapping balances cross-platform UX, ergonomic habits, and lightweight performance:
* **Cmd / Ctrl (Smart Hybrid)**: Dynamically resolves to `Command` on macOS and `Control` on Windows/Linux, ensuring synced configuration files work seamlessly across devices.
* **Ctrl, Cmd (Mac), & Shift**: Provides flexible mapping options matching physical habits, separating editing commands from OS shortcuts while maintaining natural selection muscle memory.
* **Alt / Option (Alternate Action)**: Maps standard alter keys on Mac and PC for intuitive secondary behaviors.
* **Event Modifier Logic**: Synchronous native checks ensure robust multi-window (Popout Window) compatibility and zero runtime lag.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BCS1037/SmartPick/compare/0.6.4...0.6.5

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## Fixed

- **Settings Persistence**: Fixed a critical bug where user-customized command enabled/disabled states were reset to defaults on every Obsidian restart. The migration logic that syncs defaults now only runs once, and user preferences are properly preserved across restarts.
- **Command Palette**: Fixed duplicate plugin name prefix in command palette — commands previously showed as "SmartPick: SmartPick: Copy" and now correctly display as "SmartPick: Copy".
releases.name: v0.6.2

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description: Fix macOS clipboard copy by switching to native Electron Buffer API (`public.file-url`) for seamless Finder/App pasting compatibility.

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description: Version 0.6.0 Release: Includes Copy Note Content, Copy Note File, and complete Settings UI redesign.
releases.name: Version 0.6.0

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
### Added
- **AI Configuration**: Added support for manual model ID input in the settings tab, allowing users to use any model even if it's not in the fetched list.

### Improved
- **AI Streaming**: Optimized response rendering mechanism:
    - Increased rendering interval to 150ms to reduce UI stutter during high-speed streaming (e.g., with glm-4-flash).
    - Improved stream parsing logic for better stability with fragmented data packets.
    - Added "Connecting to service..." feedback to eliminate perceived lag after clicking AI buttons.
    - Smoother scrolling behavior during text generation.
releases.name: v0.5.7

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## ✨ New Feature

### Paste URL into Selection
新增内置命令 **Paste URL into Selection** — Notion 风格的链接粘贴

- 📋 剪贴板有 URL + 选中文本 → 自动生成 `[选中文本](URL)`
- 🔄 选中 URL + 剪贴板有文本 → 反向生成 `[文本](URL)`
- 🖼️ 自动识别图片链接并生成 `![text](url)` 嵌入格式
- 📍 剪贴板有 URL + 无选区 → 插入 `[](URL)` 并自动定位光标
- 🌐 支持 http/https/ftp/obsidian 等各种协议及裸域名识别

### How to use
1. 复制一个 URL
2. 在编辑器中选中一段文本
3. 使用命令面板搜索 "Paste URL into Selection" 或点击工具栏中的链接按钮
4. 选中文本自动变为 Markdown 链接

## 🙏 Acknowledgments

This feature is inspired by [obsidian-url-into-selection](https://github.com/denolehov/obsidian-url-into-selection) by [@denolehov](https://github.com/denolehov). Thanks for the great work!
releases.name: v0.5.5 - Paste URL into Selection

- **Internal**: Moved PRD directory out of the repository structure.
releases.name: v0.5.3

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
### Fixed
- **Icons**: Corrected icons for Google and Baidu search commands to use `lucide-chrome` and `lucide-paw-print`.

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## Added
- **Commands**: Added **Insert Quote** and **Insert Footnote** commands to the built-in tools.

## Improved
- **Toolbar Configuration**: Updated the default toolbar items:
    - Removed **Italic** command from built-in tools.
    - Streamlined default enabled commands to reduce clutter (enabled: Bold, Superscript, Subscript, Inline Code, Quote, Footnote, Callout, Copy, Paste, Clear Formatting, Translate, Explain, Google, Gemini).
- **Icons**: Updated icons for Google, Baidu, and DeepSeek commands for better visual recognition.

## Fixed
- **Toolbar**: Resolved an issue where duplicate items appeared in the built-in tools group.
- **Migration**: Improved settings migration to ensure new defaults are correctly applied to existing users.
releases.name: v0.5.0

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
### Fixed
- **Toolbar**: Fixed an issue where the toolbar was not visible when selecting all text (Cmd+A) in long documents. The toolbar now automatically repositions to remain visible at the top of the viewport.

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## Added
- **Feature**: Double-click to show toolbar — double-clicking in the editor area now triggers the toolbar, even without selecting text. Ideal for insert-type commands (e.g., insert table, callout, code block).
- **Setting**: Added toggle to enable/disable the double-click trigger in toolbar settings.
- **UI**: Buttons that require text selection (AI, URL) are visually disabled when no text is selected.
releases.name: v0.4.0

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## Added
- **Feature**: Added enable/disable toggle for commands, allowing users to hide commands from the toolbar without deleting them. [#1 ](https://github.com/BCS1037/SmartPick/issues/1)

## Improved
- **UI**: Reduced spacing in command groups on settings page for a more compact layout:
    - Decreased group padding and margins.
    - Reduced title font size and spacing.
    - Optimized vertical space usage between groups.
releases.name: v0.3.3

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description: Fixed remaining  issue for Obsidian plugin review
releases.name: v0.3.2

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## Fixed

- **Code Quality**: Addressed remaining sentence case issues for Obsidian plugin review:
  - Fixed 10 UI text strings to use proper sentence case (first word capitalized, rest lowercase except proper nouns).
  - Used backtick-wrapped examples in placeholders to skip sentence case validation for technical identifiers.
  - Fixed dropdown option text: 'Custom (OpenAI-compatible)'.
  - Replaced hardcoded English strings with i18n translation function calls.
  - Fixed 'API Key' → 'API key' in i18n.ts.
releases.name: v0.3.1

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## Fixed

- **Code Quality**: Resolved all remaining Obsidian plugin review issues:
  - Fixed unawaited promises with `void` operator in `CommandManager.ts` and `PreviewModal.ts`
  - Removed unnecessary type assertion in `Toolbar.ts`
  - Converted 15 UI texts to sentence case for consistency
  - Fixed promise-in-void-function issues in callbacks
  - Removed unused `ToolbarItem` and `Notice` imports
releases.name: v0.3.0 - Plugin Review Fixes

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
## Fixed
- **Code Quality**: Addressed all Obsidian plugin review issues:
    - Replaced all `any` types with proper TypeScript interfaces.
    - Added `void` operators to handle async IIFEs in callbacks.
    - Removed unused variables and imports.
    - Replaced `@ts-ignore` comments with proper type assertions.
releases.name: v0.2.9

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
### Changed
- **Command**: Renamed "Translate" command to "翻译" and restricted functionality to English-to-Chinese translation only.
- **Data Migration**: Automatically migrate old translation template IDs to prevent conflicts.

### Improved
- **UI**: Optimized toolbar appearance by reducing overall size, removing button backgrounds, and eliminating separators for a cleaner look.

### Fixed
- **Layout**: Corrected toolbar alignment issue when selecting multi-line text.
releases.name: v0.2.8

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
### Added
- **UI**: Improved Settings UI layout:
    - Compacted command list grid (3 items per row).
    - Moved delete button to the edit modal for cleaner interface.
    - Adjusted toolbar button positions in settings.
- **Docs**: Updated README
### Fixed
- **Fix**: Resolved issue where "SmartPick" toolbar AI commands (Gemini, Doubao, Qwen, etc.) did not copy selected text to clipboard.
releases.name: v0.2.6

releases.author: BCS1037
releases.description:
### Added
- Feature: Added ability to edit existing toolbar items (commands, AI, urls, shortcuts).
- Localization: Added comprehensive translations for edit modals.

### Improved
- UI: Added "Edit" button (pencil icon) to toolbar items in settings.
- UX: Toolbar items in settings derived click-to-edit behavior.
- UI: Improved delete icon positioning for command groups.

### Fixed
- Fixed layout alignment for default command groups (Link, Shortcut) to allow proper deletion and display.
